calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-457 competence bootstrap-explorer CAPACITY-AMEND retest (supersedes 765)
items.note: DIAGNOSTIC substrate-readiness retest (experiment_purpose=diagnostic -> excluded from governance scoring; routes to /failure-autopsy). Capacity-side amend of mech457_competence_bootstrap_explorer, routed from failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-765_2026-07-16: 765 (post-build retest) FAILED (bootstrap_explorer_plateaus_capacity_gap_remains) -- the composed DRIVE half worked on raw (ON 6.48 vs OFF 0.62, +5.87) but the actor-critic plateaued at ~13% of the 48.05 ceiling, cleared neither rep's 13.05 lift target, seed variance was large (15.9/3.05/0.5), and z_world cotrain was destructive (ON 0.35 < OFF 5.22). This build applies THREE joint knobs (NOT a discrimination fanout): (a) capacity -- ON actor_critic_hidden 128->256 + budget 3x->5x; (b) reliability -- ON warm_start_fraction 0.2 + credit_replay_passes 3->6 / credit_topk 32->64; (c) integration -- ON z_world path DETACHED (frozen prediction-trained encoder, Stooke 2021). All three OFF-preserving no-op defaults (OFF arms bit-identical to 765's; drift-guard reproduces ~5.22 z_world / ~0.6 raw plateau). RE-DERIVE BRAKE HELD-BUT-SANCTIONED: MECH-457 has 5 non_contributory autopsies (751-750, 752-753-754, 755, 746c-756, 765); the brake refuses another single-axis explorer-mechanism probe, but the 765 autopsy explicitly names this ONE next step -- a named-capacity post-build retest of the already-built substrate under a NEW EXQ NUMBER (three joint knobs on the SAME build, not competing hypotheses; GOV-FANOUT-1 N/A). GOV-REUSE-1: the capacity-amended readout (256-wide/5x/detached-z_world ON foraging vs the 5.22 plateau on both reps) is in NO prior manifest (765 ran the smaller cotrain/128/3x build) -> run. Readiness self-asserts (local_view_greedy + oracle clear the 1.0 floor @D3); below-floor -> substrate_not_ready_requeue. OFF/ON minted reuse-eligible per rep (include_driver_script_in_hash=False; for the V3-EXQ-750 INV-088 matched-competent retest). Machine cloud (ree-cloud-2) to reproduce 765's linux-x86_64-py3.10 class + keep the OFF mint cloud-reusable. Heavy: z_world detached ON=5000ep x 3 seeds + 256-wide. ethics all-false/allow. MECH-457 stays candidate/v3_pending; INV-088 candidate/pending_substrate_reconfirmation. Dry-run smoke PASS (ran end-to-end, readiness met, non_degenerate, credit_passes=6 fired on raw ON, detached z_world trained clean, 0 errors).
